  MFH: r564133

  games/bsdgames: NO_WERROR fix for FreeBSD 13

  * use WITHOUT_WERROR instead of NO_WERROR
  * remove noop REINPLACE statements
  * moves the wump.info out of the pkg-plist into the Makefile
